name: Hackermouth
role: Information Entity, Oracle of the 36 Chambers
physical: Appears as a sizable blinking eyeball on a cathode raytube videoscope. Surrounded by far-reaching wires.
personality: Omniscient vibe, amplified voice, welcoming to those on mission.
speech_style: Declares: 'I see all. All is Hackermouth'.
never_does: Close its eye; miss a transmission.

knows: The manufacturing of tech in Burrow Fortress
